    Method
    Description
    static List<CounterpointChecker.Violation>
    CounterpointEngine.analyze(List<Note> cantusFirmus, List<Note> counterpoint)
    Checks a sequence of notes against basic Fux counterpoint rules.
    static List<CounterpointChecker.Violation>
    CounterpointChecker.checkParallelism(List<Note> cantusFirmus, List<Note> counterpoint)
    Detects parallel fifths and octaves between two voices.
    static boolean
    CounterpointChecker.checkVoiceRange(List<Note> voice, int maxInterval)
    Checks if the range of the voice is within a reasonable limit (e.g., 10th).
    static List<List<Integer>>
    MusicalPatternMatcher.findRepeatedIntervals(List<Note> melody, int length)
    Finds repeated melodic intervals in a note sequence.
    static boolean
    CounterpointEngine.isMelodicallyNatural(List<Note> melody)
    Validates melodic motion (conjunct vs disjunct).
    static Real
    MusicalPatternMatcher.rhythmicEntropy(List<Note> score)
    Calculates rhythmic entropy of a sequence.
